summary: Iteration 6 (v2.4) testing — Premium Proof of Delivery card + navy+gold retheme + admin PHP integration doc. Backend: 49/49 pytest passed (42 regression preserved + 7 new for v2.4: root version, lat/lng optional persistence, public daily_checkpoints array, backward-compat for no-GPS entries, seed TRIP-POD-DEMO, integration doc anchors). Frontend: Customer tracking + Driver dashboard both render premium PoDCard with Leaflet mini-map, GPS marker, dd-mm-yyyy date, HH.MM WIB time (Indonesian period format), 'Buka Google Maps' link with correct lat/lng URL. No-GPS case shows 'Lokasi GPS tidak dicatat' placeholder (no map, no gmaps link). Foto Awal counter shows 0/5 (NOT 0/6 — fix verified). Theme CSS vars: --bg=#0A1628, --gold=#BA7517, --surface=#152238 — match spec.

issues: Time displayed as '08.50 WIB' (period separator) rather than '08:50 WIB' (colon) — this follows the Indonesian convention used elsewhere in the app, acceptable but worth confirming with stakeholder.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend v2.4: GET /api/ returns v='2.4' (verified). Daily upload accepts optional lat/lng as Form floats; entries WITHOUT lat/lng do not gain those fields (backward-compat verified). Public endpoint /api/public/trips/{id} now exposes 'daily_checkpoints' array (full objects with id/date/url/ts/lat?/lng?) alongside legacy 'daily_count'. No DB schema change — additive optional fields only.

Frontend PoDCard component is well-isolated and re-used between DriverCheckpoint (data-testid='pod-card-list') and CustomerTracking (data-testid='trk-pod-list'). Both pages confirmed to render identical card structure: CP-N badge over big photo, 160px mini Leaflet map (or 'Lokasi GPS tidak dicatat' placeholder when no GPS), info row with driver name + nopol + dd-mm-yyyy + time WIB + coords + 'Buka Google Maps' link.

Leaflet map renders with read-only behavior (no scroll/drag/zoom), tile layer from OSM, red marker at correct coords (verified -6.2088, 106.8456). Google Maps href: https://www.google.com/maps?q=-6.2088,106.8456 — correct format.

Theme retheme complete: navy palette (--bg #0A1628, --bg-2 not directly inspected but --surface #152238 confirmed) + gold (--gold #BA7517). Text/background contrast is good (white-on-navy, gold accents on dark surface). No dark-on-dark contrast issues observed.
Foto Awal progress tile now shows '0/5' (fix verified — old '0/6' no longer present in body text).

Integration doc /app/INTEGRATION_PO_ADMIN_PHP.md present with all 5 sections: REACT_APP_URL constant, kirimLinkCheckpoint replacement, copyLinkTracking new function, ODOO_WEBHOOK_URL env, Xendit drop-in replacement snippet.
Minor: server.py is now ~470 lines; still acceptable but consider splitting upload/photo handlers into a dedicated module for future iterations.
Minor: DriverCheckpoint.jsx was already large (~800 lines pre-v2.4); v2.4 added PoD section reasonable. Recommend extracting NameStep/SOPStep into separate files (carryover from iter-4/5).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration6_pod.py (NEW — 7 tests covering v2.4 PoD lat/lng, public daily_checkpoints, backward-compat, integration doc)

success_rate.frontend: 100% — PoDCard rendering, theme CSS, no-GPS placeholder, /5 fix, Google Maps URL all verified on both Customer Tracking and Driver pages

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: TRIP-POD-DEMO (nopol from earlier seeding 'B 1234 POD', driver 'Driver Demo PoD', 1 daily checkpoint with lat=-6.2088 lng=106.8456). TRIP-POD-NOGPS (nopol 'B 1 NG', driver 'Driver NoGPS', 1 daily checkpoint WITHOUT lat/lng — for testing placeholder case). Previous seed TRIP-V23-FE still intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.4 = Premium PoD card with navy+gold theme. Seed trips: TRIP-POD-DEMO (GPS), TRIP-POD-NOGPS (no GPS). Frontend testids added: pod-card-list (driver), trk-pod-list (tracking), pod-card. To re-test driver PoD section, navigate with query params to driver page, complete NameStep (input-nama + btn-save-nama) and SOPStep (btn-sop-ok), then scroll to PoD section. Customer tracking can be opened directly via ?track=TRIP-POD-DEMO. Backend regression suite now has 49 tests across 2 files. Use 'networkidle' wait_for_load_state with caution — Leaflet tile loading keeps the network busy; use 'domcontentloaded' + page.wait_for_timeout(2500-3500) instead.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All v2.4 requirements implemented per spec.
